endpoints.name: GET /v1.0/compareStation/{stationName}/
endpoints.description:
Get forecast and realtime information for known points
None
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{STATIONNAME}} with a real stationname.

endpoints.name: GET /v1.0/getAemetStation/{stationName}/{period}/
endpoints.description:
Get data from the aemet stations
None
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PERIOD}} with a real period. Replace {{STATIONNAME}} with a real stationname.

endpoints.name: GET /v1.0/getEasyWind/{easywindId}/
endpoints.description:
Get data from the easywind weather stations
None
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{EASYWINDID}} with a real easywindid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1.0/getEventStations/{eventId}/
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{EVENTID}} with a real eventid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1.0/getForecastPoints/{yatchclubid}/language/{language}
endpoints.description:
Get forecast points of a yatchclub
None
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{YATCHCLUBID}} with a real yatchclubid. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: GET /v1.0/getForecastTimeSeries/{latitude}/{longitude}/
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LATITUDE}} with a real latitude. Replace {{LONGITUDE}} with a real longitude.

endpoints.name: GET /v1.0/getForecastTimeSeriesWrf/{latitude}/{longitude}/
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LATITUDE}} with a real latitude. Replace {{LONGITUDE}} with a real longitude.

endpoints.name: GET /v1.0/getSocibWeatherStation/{stationName}/{period}/
endpoints.description:
Get data from the socib bahia de palma buoy
None
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PERIOD}} with a real period. Replace {{STATIONNAME}} with a real stationname.

endpoints.name: GET /v1.0/getWeatherDisplay/{stationName}/
endpoints.description:
Get data from the weather display software
None
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{STATIONNAME}} with a real stationname.

endpoints.name: GET /v1.0/getWebCams/
endpoints.description:
Get forecast and realtime information for known points
None
